headline: CVS Health (CVS) Reaches Proposed FTC Settlement on Insulin Pricing
summary: CVS Health Corporation (NYSE:CVS) is one of the 10 High PE Stocks Insiders Are Buying. On March 24, 2026, CVS Health Corporation (NYSE:CVS) reached a proposed settlement with the Federal Trade Commission related to insulin pricing, according to a Reuters report. The company said the process is expected to conclude in the coming weeks, though […]

headline: CVS to Grow Store Footprint This Year With 60 New Locations
summary: The drugstore chain will open traditional stores, Target-based locations and pharmacy-only sites after years of significant downsizing.

raw.headline: CVS to Grow Store Footprint This Year With 60 New Locations

headline: CVS Pharmacy® celebrates opening of first pharmacy-only location in Chicago
summary: CVS Health® (NYSE: CVS) today unveiled the first of nearly 20 pharmacy-only, apothecary-style CVS Pharmacy® locations it plans to open this year to increase access to pharmacy care. The new pharmacy, located at 2628 West Pershing Road in Chicago's West End, will help bridge gaps in care and make it easier for community members to access medications, immunizations and other health care services provided by pharmacists.
